name: Extra Cheese Lasagne
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Frozen chopped spinach, thawed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the pasta dough according to recipe directions. Cut into strips about 13 inches long and 3 inches wide.
2. Gather all the trimmed scraps and reroll the dough to make enough noodles. This recipe should work out exactly if you roll your dough thin.
3. Combine the ricotta, garlic, spinach, egg, and salt. Mix well by hand or in a food processor.
4. To assemble the lasagne:
a. Pour a little bit of sauce in the bottom of a 9 x 13-inch baking dish.
b. Cover with a layer of noodles, then a layer of sauce.
c. Sprinkle a layer of provolone, mozzarella, and Parmesan cheeses.
d. Cover with a layer of noodles, then sauce, then the ricotta cheese mixture.
e. Top with a layer of noodles, sauce, and grated cheeses.
5. Finish with a layer of noodles, sauce, and grated cheese.
6. Cover the lasagne lightly (if using aluminum foil, make a tent with the foil so it doesn't touch the top).
7. Bake for 1 hour at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
8. Remove the cover and bake for an additional 30 minutes.
9. Allow the lasagne to set for 10 minutes before serving. This lasagne will be quite firm and can be served in tidy-looking squares. Serves 6 generously.
